allowed: Textbook, personal notes, lab documentation, Kali VM, your Lab 5.1 risk matrix
tips: Review Lab 5.1 (vulnerability assessment) and your Lab 5.2 Engagement Packet
Know CVSS 3.1 scoring and how technical severity differs from business priority
Understand the four risk treatment options and when each applies
timeManagement: Budget ~90 seconds per question. Timer starts on click and cannot be paused.
readyMessage: Make sure you have a stable connection and 45 uninterrupted minutes.
